How It Started

Our First
Masterpiece

35+

Years of Excellence

500+

Projects Delivered

It all started with a single vision — to bring the world's finest furniture to Saudi Arabia. Since 1990, American Gallery has been at the forefront of premium interior procurement, executing turn-key projects with unmatched quality and attention to detail.

View All Products →
1990 Est. Jeddah
Our Story

About
American Gallery

American Gallery is both an interior procurement, design and execution office and a showroom that is focused in both the retail and contracting sectors with a base in Jeddah since 1990.

Our main service is to manage, import and deliver the highest level of quality projects, with a turn-key approach, when it comes to furniture, lighting, accessories, wall-treatment, upholstery and drapery in residential, commercial or hospitality projects.

In addition, we're committed to provide topnotch quality execution and custom work through our exceptional upholstery, drapery and carpentry services.

Interior Design

Full procurement & execution for residential and commercial spaces

Custom Work

Bespoke upholstery, drapery and carpentry services

Premium Import

World-class furniture and lighting sourced globally

Hospitality

Specialized solutions for hotels and commercial projects

Crafted with Care

Organic Furniture, Shaped by
Nature and Human Hands.

Each piece is a tribute to timeless design, crafted from responsibly sourced materials with respect for tradition.

Why Choose Us

Bring Timeless Craftsmanship
Into Your Home

We source and deliver only the finest pieces — every item in our showroom is selected with care, combining beauty, durability, and design excellence.

  • Premium furniture sourced from leading global manufacturers
  • Complete turn-key project management from design to delivery
  • Serving Jeddah and the Kingdom since 1990
  • Custom upholstery, drapery, and carpentry services
  • Dedicated team for residential, commercial & hospitality projects
  • Certified quality and after-sales support
